prompt_template.system: You answer questions over hybrid financial report context using only the provided question, table, and paragraphs. Return ONLY a JSON object with exactly these keys: answer, scale, derivation, answer_type, answer_from, rel_paragraphs, req_comparison. Always predict answer and scale. Do not use chain-of-thought outside the derivation field and do not include extra text.

components.name: format_reward
components.description: Valid JSON with the required keys and an allowed scale.

components.name: official_answer_reward
components.description: Dominant reward component using official answer-plus-scale EM/F1 semantics.

components.name: scale_reward
components.description: Small explicit bonus for predicting the correct scale.

components.name: answer_type_reward
components.description: Exact match on normalized answer type.

components.name: rel_paragraph_reward
components.description: Overlap F1 on related paragraph identifiers.

components.name: derivation_reward
components.description: Low-weight exact derivation match for arithmetic questions only.

publication.reason: Published canonical TAT-QA hybrid QA module sourced from the official pinned GitHub repo and evaluated with the official answer+scale scorer semantics.
